headline: Biogen (BIIB) Valuation Check After Mixed Recent Returns And Growing Focus On LEQEMBI Growth Potential
summary: Biogen: recent performance snapshot Biogen (BIIB) has been on investors’ radar after a mixed stretch in the stock, with a slight negative move over the past month but a positive total return over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Biogen. Recent trading has been mixed, with a 1 day share price return of 1.47% and a 90 day share price return of 5.70%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 52.98% contrasts with weaker 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns, suggesting improving...
